mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_memory (user_id, type, title, body, summary, origin_session_id, source_session_ids, confidence, importance, access_count, embedding, created_at, updated_at, last_accessed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{body}, #{summary}, #{originSessionId}, #{sourceSessionIds}, #{confidence}, #{importance}, #{accessCount}, #{embedding}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_memory SET title = #{title}, body = #{body}, summary = #{summary}, source_session_ids = #{sourceSessionIds}, confidence = #{confidence}, importance = #{importance}, embedding = #{embedding}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ai_memory SET access_count = access_count + 1, last_accessed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ai_memory WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_memory SET importance = #{importance}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_memory WHERE user_id = #{userId}
